assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets Authentication.CookieLifetime to 8 hours and CookieSlidingExpiration to false

assertions.rationale: Does not configure ExpiredSessionsTriggerBackchannelLogout — mentions expired session cleanup vaguely but doesn't provide the specific property

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
The web.app client has BackChannelLogoutUri set to a valid HTTPS URL

assertions.rationale: CoordinateClientLifetimesWithUserSession is not configured anywhere in the response
